content:
# How to Create AI-Generated Social Media Ads in 2026

Creating effective social media ads requires compelling visuals and copy. AI tools make it easy to create professional ads without a designer!

Check out our [[link:/category/Productivity|Productivity category]] for more AI tools.

---

## Step 1: Write Compelling Ad Copy

Use [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] to generate multiple ad copy variations quickly.

**Try Rytr**: {{AFFILIATE_RYTR}}

---

## Step 2: Create Visual Assets

Use [[link:/tools/4|Canva Magic Design]] to create stunning ad visuals.

### Canva for Social Ads
- **Platform templates**: Perfect dimensions for each platform
- **Magic Edit**: Generate visuals with text prompts
- **Brand kit**: Maintain consistency

**Try Canva**: https://canva.com

---

## Step 3: Generate Video Ads

Use [[link:/tools/201|Pictory]] or [[link:/tools/51|VEED]] for video ad creation.

**Try Pictory**: {{AFFILIATE_PICTORY}}

**Try VEED**: https://veed.io

---

## Our Social Ad Toolkit

| Element | Tool | Affiliate |
|---------|------|-----------|
| Copy | [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] | Yes |
| Visuals | [[link:/tools/4|Canva]] | No |
| Video | [[link:/tools/201|Pictory]] | Yes |

Ready to create your social media ads? Try these tools today!

For more insights, check out [[link:/blog/best-ai-tools-for-facebook-ads-2026|Best AI Tools for Facebook Ads]]
